ddls:
CREATE TABLE "logbooks" (
  "logbook_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each logbook */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the logbook */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship that kept the logbook */,
  "voyage_dates" TEXT /* Dates of the voyage */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the ship during the voyage */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship */,
  "port_of_departure" TEXT /* Port of departure */,
  "port_of_arrival" TEXT /* Port of arrival */,
  "logbook_conditions" TEXT /* Physical condition of the logbook */,
  "number_of_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the logbook */,
  "transcribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the logbook is fully transcribed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("logbook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logbooks_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the captain */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the ship was built */,
  "tonnage" INTEGER /* Tonnage of the ship */,
  "home_port" TEXT /* Home port of the ship */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship that made the voyage */,
  "voyage_dates" TEXT /* Dates of the voyage */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the ship during the voyage */,
  "logbook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the logbook */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain */,
  "total_whales_hunted" INTEGER /* Total number of whales hunted */,
  "total_tons_of_whale_oil" REAL /* Total tons of whale oil */,
  "logbook_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions during the voyage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "logbook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the logbook the image belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* Thumbnail of the image */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the image was created */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number of the logbook */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size in bytes */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_logbook_id FOREIGN KEY ("logbook_id") REFERENCES logbooks ("logbook_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is staff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the image */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, download, transcription) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details about the interaction */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device and browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_interactions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcriptions" (
  "transcription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcription */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being transcribed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the transcription */,
  "transcription" TEXT /* Text of the transcription */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the transcription was created */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the transcription */,
  "transcription_status" TEXT /* Status of the transcription (e.g., draft, review, complete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcriptions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logbook_pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "logbook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the logbook the page belongs to */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number of the logbook */,
  "page_text" TEXT /* Text of the logbook page */,
  "page_conditions" TEXT /* Physical condition of the page */,
  "transcription_status" TEXT /* Status of the transcription (e.g., draft, review, complete) */,
  "transcribed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who transcribed the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logbook_pages_logbook_id FOREIGN KEY ("logbook_id") REFERENCES logbooks ("logbook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logbook_pages_transcribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("transcribed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_images" (
  "page_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page image */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page the image belongs to */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_images_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES logbook_pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_images_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyage_logs" (
  "voyage_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage log */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage the log belongs to */,
  "logbook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the logbook the log belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the voyage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the voyage */,
  "total_entries" INTEGER /* Total number of entries in the log */,
  "log_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyage_logs_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyage_logs_logbook_id FOREIGN KEY ("logbook_id") REFERENCES logbooks ("logbook_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyage_log_pages" (
  "voyage_log_page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage log page */,
  "voyage_log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage log the page belongs to */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page */,
  "page_conditions" TEXT /* Physical condition of the page */,
  "transcription_status" TEXT /* Status of the transcription (e.g., draft, review, complete) */,
  "transcribed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who transcribed the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_log_page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyage_log_pages_voyage_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_log_id") REFERENCES voyage_logs ("voyage_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyage_log_pages_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES logbook_pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyage_log_pages_transcribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("transcribed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zooniverse_data" (
  "zooniverse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Zooniverse data point */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date of the classification */,
  "classification_details" TEXT /* Details about the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zooniverse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zooniverse_data_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_keys" (
  "set_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set key */,
  "set_key" TEXT /* Set key */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the set key */,
  "set_key_type" TEXT /* Type of the set key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_key_id")
)
